LanguageData.VFEPD_BangBus.description: A basic passenger transport, the Bangbus is a relatively cheap piece of machinery to construct to transport people across roads of flat terrain. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BangBus.label: bang bus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulldog.description: A general main battle tank, the Bulldog is an improved combat vehicle that performs well in any engagement. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulldog.label: bulldog
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bunsen.description: A basic light tank, the Bunsen is a modified armoured vehicle suited for taking on enemy fortifications and exposed infantry. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bunsen.label: bunsen
LanguageData.VFEPD_Charley.description: A general motorcycle, the Charley is a very effective single-person vehicle with a small cargo capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Charley.label: charley
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dinghy.description: A very basic motorised boat, the Dingy is an incredibly cheap and discrete method of transportation over water. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dinghy.label: dinghy
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dirtbike.description: A basic off-road motorcycle, the Dirtbike is a very cheap vehicle that allows a single user to travel quickly, efficiently and quietly. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dirtbike.label: dirtbike
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frog.description: A basic reusable transport pod, the Frog is a relatively cheap vehicle that is the first option when it comes to flying without crashing into the ground. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frog.label: frog
LanguageData.VFEPD_Highwayman.description: A basic infantry fighting vehicle, the Highwayman is the cheapest weaponized option for transporting three people. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Highwayman.label: highwayman
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mosquito.description: A general-purpose aircraft, the Mosquito is an extremely fast and mobile mode of transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mosquito.label: mosquito
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mule.description: A basic cargo transport, the Mule is a relatively cheap vehicle that can carry a large amount of cargo across smooth roads of flat terrain. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mule.label: mule
LanguageData.VFEPD_Prowler.description: A basic off-road exploration vehicle, the Prowler is relatively cheap to construct and is an effective all-weather option for efficient travel over steep terrain. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Prowler.label: prowler
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadkill.description: A basic medium tank, the Roadkill is a comparatively cheap armoured vehicle suited for short engagements. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadkill.label: roadkill
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadrunner.description: A general cargo transporter, the Roadrunner is an excellent vehicle for getting a lot of material from one location to another. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadrunner.label: roadrunner
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scytheman.description: A juryrigged multiple rocket launcher system, the Scytheman is a repurposed farming vehicle intended to saturate a location with inaccurate volleys of explosives. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scytheman.label: scytheman
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smuggler.description: A general-purpose aircraft, the Smuggler is an extremely fast and effective mode of transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smuggler.label: smuggler
LanguageData.VFEPD_Snatcher.description: A general passenger transport, the Snatcher is a solid vehicle for transporting people to different locations. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Snatcher.label: snatcher
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tango.description: A general purpose armoured personnel carrier, the Tango is a slow but hardy troop transport. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tango.label: tango
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toad.description: A squad and mortar deployment pod, the Toad is a somewhat expensive vehicle to quickly mount a siege on a nearby locale without exposing your gunners to danger. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toad.label: toad
LanguageData.VFEPD_Traveller.description: A basic road vehicle suited for flat terrain, the Traveller is a relatively cheap and fast option that still performs quite amicably in cold weather and snowy conditions. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Traveller.label: traveller
LanguageData.VFEPD_Trawler.description: A general-purpose boat, the Trawler is an effective long distance transportation across open waters. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Trawler.label: trawler
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wagon.description: A general all-rounder vehicle, the Wagon performs well in all categories with a good cargo and passenger capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wagon.label: wagon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Warbird.description: A general-purpose fighter plane, the Warbird is an incredibly fast and effective attack craft. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Warbird.label: warbird
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wisent.description: A military-grade all-purpose transporter, the Wisent is a powerful truck capable of transporting both plentiful cargo and soldiers into hostile territory. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wisent.label: wisent
